_comment: Per-crank state spec. The installer reads this to know how to install this crank's state into checkouts/current. State IS the big unified database named by `source_db`: make_state snapshots it (sqlite online-backup, WAL-safe) into `artifact` and stores that on the `side_branch`. `seed` is a legacy fallback ONLY (used when source_db is absent) — it fabricates a throwaway stub and must not be relied on.
